form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of four months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign second of 13 at Terang Bm62 December 16 over 1200m, a head behind He's Godspeed carrying 58kg at $3.50. When resuming last campaign fourth of 9 at Warrnambool Bm62 October 16 over 1000m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Nightime Star carrying 56.5kg at $6.50. Expecting a bold return.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months came from midfield; 2nd of 9 at Mt Gambier 0-56 on March 22 over 900m, 0.7 len behind Youraway with 60kg at $9.
